title: Improve pmgen, Add "peepopt" pass with shift-mul pattern

features.name: dynamic part-select with variable base expression
features.description: Code should include a dynamic part-select using the +: operator where the base index is a variable expression computed from multiplication of a select signal and a width parameter

features.name: clog2 in port width declaration
features.description: Code should include use of the $clog2 system function to compute the bit width of a select signal in a port declaration

features.name: parameterized array width with multiplication expression
features.description: Code should include a packed array whose width is computed as a multiplication of two parameters
